description: Single-regime proof — pivot regime 1.0m / 300mA. Justificativa: log_var = -3.20 (mediana do dataset, 0.29 nats da mediana global de 27 regimes), SNR = 9.1 dB (moderado, representativo), proximo ao pico de eficiencia do LED.

regimes.description: 1.0 m / 300 mA — pivot regime for single-regime proof (Etapa B1)
